understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked with '+', ensuring that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger a WIN and ultimately complete the full set of levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move shifts the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by a wall/boundary or an object interaction prevents motion; some adjacent objects may be pushable and can be moved along when pushed. Levels can contain multiple selectable pieces, and control is switched by using CLICK on the exact pixel-coordinate position of another selectable; movement_blocked flags are only hints and do not always perfectly predict whether a move will succeed.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_UP | Test whether moving into the adjacent wall triggers any sliding/teleport/collision quirk to escape the pocket.
history.reasoning: Test whether moving into the adjacent wall triggers any sliding/teleport/collision quirk to escape the pocket.
